dialogue.text: Good morning, good morning. How are you? Great. I can't stop thinking about that apartment
dialogue.zh: 早安，早安。你好嗎？很好。我一直無法停止想那間公寓
dialogue.ja: おはよう、おはよう。元気？元気だよ。あのアパートのことがずっと頭から離れないんだ

dialogue.text: we saw last night. But no, the fact that it has two bathrooms, one for HVAS, is amazing.
dialogue.zh: 我們昨晚看的。但不，那裡有兩個浴室，其中一個有HVAS，真是太棒了。
dialogue.ja: 昨夜見たんだよね。でもね、バスルームが2つあって、そのうちの1つにHVASがあるっていうのはすごいよ。

dialogue.text: Yeah, that is a great feature. There's so many good things about that place. The wood
dialogue.zh: 是啊，那真是個很棒的特色。那地方有很多優點。木質
dialogue.ja: うん、それは素晴らしい特徴だよね。あの場所には良いところがたくさんある。木の

dialogue.text: floors in the living room and dining room are my favorite, so I've always wanted wooden

dialogue.text: floors. They're so beautiful. Yeah, there is something I thought was a bit unusual about

dialogue.ja: 床だよ。とても美しいよね。うん、ちょっと変わってるなと思ったことがあるんだ

dialogue.text: the place. What's that? Did you notice this funny smell in smaller bedroom? It's

dialogue.ja: その場所だよ。何？小さい寝室で変な匂いに気づいた？

dialogue.text: hard to say what it was. You know, I wondered about that too. Any guesses on what that horrible

dialogue.ja: 何の匂いか言いにくいね。僕もそれについて考えたよ。あのひどい匂いは何だと思う？

dialogue.text: odor could be? I think it smells like cats. At least, that's what I hope it was.
dialogue.zh: 味道是什麼？我覺得像貓的味道。至少，我希望是這樣。
dialogue.ja: 臭いは何だろう？猫の匂いがすると思う。少なくとも、そうであってほしい。

dialogue.text: So what else did you like about the place? Well, the kitchen is big as my kitchen is now,
dialogue.zh: 那你還喜歡那地方什麼？嗯，廚房和我現在的廚房一樣大，

dialogue.text: but it's so much more modern. That's true. And I love the huge windows in the living room

dialogue.ja: でもずっとモダンだよね。そうだね。そしてリビングルームの大きな窓が好きだよ

dialogue.text: that overlook the sea. It's truly a magnificent view, don't you think? Yeah, I think that's
dialogue.zh: 可以看到海景。真是壯麗的景色，你不覺得嗎？是的，我覺得那是

dialogue.text: the best reason to take the place. The view was extraordinary. Yes, I also think the
dialogue.zh: 租那裡的最佳理由。景色非常棒。是的，我也覺得
dialogue.ja: その場所を選ぶ最高の理由だよ。景色は素晴らしかった。うん、僕もそう思うよ

dialogue.text: balcony is gorgeous. Yeah, it is. Some of the plants that the current resident has

dialogue.text: there are huge. She must have been there a long time. Yeah, I think so, too. I hope we could

dialogue.text: plants, too. How about you? I like having a lot of plants in the house, too. And I've been
dialogue.zh: 種植物。你呢？我也喜歡家裡有很多植物。我還種了

dialogue.text: able to grow some really huge ferns and keck dye. Great. There is a question I have, though.
dialogue.zh: 一些很大的蕨類和keck dye。太好了。不過我有個問題。
dialogue.ja: 本当に大きなシダやケックダイを育てることができたよ。素晴らしいね。でも質問があるんだ。

dialogue.text: Yes? Well, both of the bedrooms are as big as my bedroom now. But one has a fireplace

dialogue.text: and the other one has a balcony. Uh-huh. So I was wondering, which of those beautiful
dialogue.zh: 另一個有陽台。嗯哼。所以我在想，你想要哪個漂亮的
dialogue.ja: もう一つはバルコニーがあるんだ。うん。だからどちらの素敵な

dialogue.text: bedrooms do you want to have? That's really hard to decide. I know. The romantic fireplace
dialogue.zh: 臥室你想要？真的很難決定。我知道。浪漫的壁爐
dialogue.ja: 寝室が欲しい？決めるのは本当に難しいよね。わかるよ。ロマンチックな暖炉は

dialogue.text: on a winter's evening just imagine curling up with someone special in front of a roaring
dialogue.zh: 冬夜裡，想像和特別的人依偎在熊熊火焰前

dialogue.text: fire. Mmm, I'm just really enjoying the idea of a fireplace in my room. I know. But then
dialogue.zh: 火焰。嗯，我真的很喜歡房間裡有壁爐的想法。我知道。但接著
dialogue.ja: 火だ。うん、部屋に暖炉があるっていう考えがすごく好きなんだ。わかるよ。でもそれから

dialogue.text: there's the idea of having a bedroom open to the starry night sky. It would provide a lovely breeze
dialogue.zh: 還有臥室可以打開看星空的想法。會有宜人的微風

dialogue.text: in the summer and make the bedrooms seem even bigger, like having two rooms. I know. I love the
dialogue.zh: 夏天時，讓臥室看起來更大，就像有兩個房間一樣。我知道。我喜歡
dialogue.ja: 夏には涼しい風が入ってきて、寝室がもっと広く感じられる、まるで2つの部屋があるみたいだよね。わかるよ。僕はその

dialogue.text: idea of both of them. The fireplace is so romantic and the balcony will be beautiful in the wall
dialogue.zh: 兩者的想法。壁爐很浪漫，陽台在牆邊會很美
dialogue.ja: 両方のアイデアが好きだよ。暖炉はとてもロマンチックだし、バルコニーは壁のそばで美しいだろうね

dialogue.text: I don't know which one's better. Me either. Well, one thing I do know is that we won't have either
dialogue.zh: 我不知道哪個比較好。我也不知道。不過我知道的是，如果我們不把錢湊齊，
dialogue.ja: どっちがいいかわからないな。僕もだよ。でも一つだけわかっているのは、もしお金を集めて

dialogue.text: the beautiful balcony or the romantic fireplace if we don't get our money together and get over
dialogue.zh: 我們就不會有美麗的陽台或浪漫的壁爐，
dialogue.ja: 美しいバルコニーやロマンチックな暖炉は手に入らないってことだ。

dialogue.text: there and signed out lease before someone else does. So we want this place right? Yes, I do. Do you?

dialogue.ja: 誰かに先を越される前に、そこに行って契約書にサインしないとね。だからこの場所が欲しいんだよね？うん、欲しいよ。君は？

dialogue.text: I will if you will. Well, it's going to be a little expensive at first. I'm going to have to watch

dialogue.ja: 君がそうなら僕もそうするよ。まあ、最初はちょっと高くつくけどね。僕は支出を気をつけないといけない

dialogue.text: my spending habits. There are a few things I'm going to have to go without, like no Starbucks for a while.

dialogue.text: Mmm, no clothing shopping for at least six months. I know I'm on me too. I'll have to cut back on
dialogue.zh: 嗯，至少六個月不買衣服。我知道，我也是。我得減少

dialogue.text: some things too. No more movies three times a week. No I've done this out for a while. And there are
